description: An ICE designed official-statement card on a dark navy textured (wood-grain-like) background. The top-left bears the DHS seal beside gray text 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.' A thin horizontal red rule separates the header from the body. Centered below in a bold white serif heading is the word 'STATEMENT,' followed by centered white serif body text: 'ICE extends sincere condolences to the loved ones of those killed during the midair collision near Reagan National Airport in our nation's capital. We wish strength to all those involved in the recovery mission.' This is a formal, somber condolence template (the agency's standard statement layout) rather than a propaganda meme or pop-culture parody; it is a designed graphic (is_designed=true) but its purpose is institutional mourning/PR following the DCA midair collision, addressed to the general public.
notable_text: STATEMENT; ICE extends sincere condolences ... midair collision near Reagan National Airport
